overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character with blonde hair and red pants walking through a dimly lit indoor market. The character approaches a vendor counter in a neon-lit industrial environment featuring a police vehicle, vending machines, and multi-level walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk market hall with police checkpoint

events.description: character walks past the police barrier vehicle on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market hall toward the back counter area

notable_agents.action: NPC standing near the police barrier vehicle

entered.detail: large black police vehicle with POLICE text on the side
illuminated food vendor stall with green and yellow lighting
scattered cardboard boxes and trash on the concrete floor
elevated walkway with railings on the upper level of the market

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide cyberpunk market hall with neon lighting. A police barrier vehicle sits on the left while various market stalls line the right side. The floor is littered with cardboard debris, and an upper metal catwalk is visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: vendor counter approach with stacked supplies

events.description: approaches the service counter area with fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: moving toward the vendor counter at the back of the market hall

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the service counter preparing items

entered.detail: tall red vending machine with illuminated product display
long white service counter with vendor behind it
metal stairs leading to upper level with orange lighting

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the market toward a service counter. A red vending machine appears on the left while the target counter becomes more prominent. The vendor becomes visible behind the counter as the character approaches, with metal stairs visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor counter with digital menu displays

events.description: character stops at the counter and camera begins panning right
camera pans to reveal upper market levels and dining area

agents.ego_description: standing at the service counter engaging with the vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor leaning over the counter serving food or items

entered.detail: illuminated green text menu display behind the counter
stoves and food preparation equipment behind the counter
purple and blue circular neon sign on the right wall
plastic table and chairs in the corner seating area

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the service counter where a vendor is working under fluorescent lighting. The camera pans right to reveal cooking equipment, a green digital menu board, and the upper levels of the market. A circular neon sign and dining furniture become visible as the camera explores the counter area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit cyberpunk market that narrows from a wide industrial hall into an intimate interaction at a service counter. It begins by trailing the character past a police barrier vehicle and various market stalls, moving across a floor littered with cardboard debris beneath a distant metal catwalk. As the character pushes deeper into the market, the perspective shifts toward a specific service counter, passing a red vending machine on the left and metal stairs on the right. The scene then culminates as the character stops at the counter, where the camera pans right to reveal a vendor working under fluorescent lighting. This final movement expands to showcase cooking equipment, a green digital menu board, and a circular neon sign overlooking the market's upper levels and dining furniture.
